claimBoundary: Dense generic-SiPh review envelope only; no foundry PDK, DRC, LVS, or scaled routed tapeout GDS is claimed.
limitations: The max-qubit row is an aggressive dense review envelope, not a DRC/LVS-clean generated foundry layout.
Fiber pitch adapters, thermal crosstalk, package keepouts, source/detector placement, and process rules remain generic.

maxQubitSearch.claimBoundary: Maximum qubits are bounded by the local review-only layout envelope, not hardware or foundry feasibility.

bankedIoEnvelope.claimBoundary: Banking/mux model is a packaging envelope only; no package drawing, probe card, or DRC/LVS closure is claimed.

dominantBlockers: foundry_pdk_missing: generic SiPh layers are not a foundry-locked layer map.
drc_not_run: no foundry DRC deck has been executed.
lvs_not_run: no optical/electrical LVS deck has been executed.
